domain: Tibetan thangka pigment preparation (mineral pigments hand-ground for days + binder strength matched to pigment density; gold/cinnabar requires strongest binder)
specific_mechanism: Binder strength proportional to pigment density to preserve heavy/important pigments.
llm_application: PDMPA: continuous density-proportional precision allocation in mixed-precision quantization; per-matrix density scalar (gradient mag + SV concentration + downstream impact) drives bit-precision; auto-refinement from quantization-error spectrum monitoring.
novelty_claim: Mixed-Precision Quantization (2510.16805), Systematic LLM Quantization (2508.16712), Binary Weight+Activation PTQ (2504.05352) cover mixed/static precision. None retrieve continuous density-proportional binder-strength precision allocation with auto-refinement.
